name: Self-propelled artillery
descriptionTemplate: When commanding an artillery unit to attack, gain X% chance of attacking again after annihilating enemy troops

progression.renderedDescFr: When commanding an artillerie unité to attaque, gain 20% chance of attacking again after annihilating ennemi troops

descriptionTemplateFr: When commanding an artillerie unité to attaque, gain X% chance of attacking again after annihilating ennemi troops
longDesc: Compétence spécifique à un général. « Self-propelled artillerie » monte jusqu'au niveau 5. Au niveau maximum (5), elle applique l'effet suivant : « When commanding an artillerie unité to attaque, gain 100% chance of attacking again after annihilating ennemi troops ». Signature de carte — impossible à remplacer, définit souvent l'identité tactique du général.
longDescEn: A general-specific skill. "Self-propelled artillery" scales up to level 5. At max level (5), the skill applies the following effect: "When commanding an artillery unit to attack, gain 100% chance of attacking again after annihilating enemy troops". A card signature — cannot be swapped; it often defines the general's tactical identity.
longDescDe: Eine generalspezifische Fähigkeit. „Self-propelled artillery“ skaliert bis Stufe 5. Auf Maximalstufe (5) wirkt folgender Effekt: „When commanding an artillery unit to attack, gain 100% chance of attacking again after annihilating enemy troops“. Eine Karten-Signatur — nicht austauschbar, prägt oft die taktische Identität des Generals.
